properties.verseOrder: V1 C2 V3 C2 V4 C2

verse.name: V1
C2
verse.lines: In Your presence, That's where I am strong, In Your presence, oh Lord my God, In Your presence, that's where I belong; Seeking Your face, touching Your grace, In the cleft of the Rock, in Your presence oh God.

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: I want to hide where the flood of evil cannot reach me, Where I'm covered by the Blood; I want to be where the schemes of darkness cannot touch me, In Your presence oh God.

verse.name: V4
